CustomField.description: The date the fee was received. This is not for tracking the Application Fee or Earnest Money Paid. Used for tracking additional deposits and/or fees during the application and contract period.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The date the fee was received. This is not for tracking the Application Fee or Earnest Money Paid. Used for tracking additional deposits and/or fees during the application and contract period.
CustomField.label: Commitment Fee Paid
